title: Samsung's 50,000-Worker Walkout Begins May 21 — AI Memory Bonus Dispute Puts $43 Billion at Risk
description: Samsung Electronics has initiated an emergency production management regime for its semiconductor division, exactly one week before a scheduled general strike.

title: Which AI Chip Stock Could Be the Next Nvidia? Broadcom, Marvell, AMD or Intel?
description: Investors are searching for the next Nvidia in AI chips. Broadcom, Marvell, AMD and Intel each offer a different route to the same boom, but the competition is still wide open.

title: Abishai Financial Asia Eyes AI Memory Supercycle
description: Abishai Financial Asia tracks how Artificial Intelligence, DDR5 demand, Micron, and SanDisk are reshaping the memory chip market amid the growing AI memory supercycle.
